model: whisper-base (converted in-job by nightly-asr-wer.yml — no extra download)
input: one LibriSpeech dev-clean utterance already decoded by the WER leg
seed_via: .github/workflows/nightly-asr-wer.yml companion RTF step, run on ubuntu-latest via workflow_dispatch. The owner reviews the uploaded artifact and commits the real rtf here.
do_not_seed_from: an M1/aarch64 rig, and note full-model ASR RTF on a GitHub-hosted shared runner is noisier than mel-frontend — this leg is ADVISORY (open question #6): it records the measurement, it does not fail the nightly on a breach until variance is characterised.
gate: advisory record-only while a placeholder; once seeded, a >5% regression is annotated but (per open question #6) does not fail the run — the WER breach is the actionable gate on this workflow.
